misc.text: Once again, this is bait. Logan Paul doesn’t care if you think he’s a real one piece fan. He doesn’t care if you ratio him. He only cares that you’re publicly associating his name *with* one piece. He saw y’all dunking on Mr Beast yesterday and thought “I want some of that heat.”
